content:
We currently have around seven participants gathered so far.
There are also members of the community who are viewing this tournament positively, which is very encouraging.

I will be hosting a live communication stream aimed at helping new beginners.
Below is an illustration of the tournament provided by a viewer.
Isn’t this adorable group of four just lovely?

I will do my best to make this tournament a success.
Thank you!

link  : https://arca.live/b/forgettingeve/165609700?p=1
